fields.helpText: Enter the client ID assigned by the vendor.

When transmitted, updating, and cancelling collection efforts a comment is automatically stored in the COMMENT field of file 430 (Account Receivable).  Enter here the name, or abbreviation, of the collection agency you're using.  This will be included in the comments which are stored.  For instance, if you enter "TransWorld" here, then the message generated might look like:       <<01-Jun-97>>>  14-day review accomplished by TransWorld.

Enter here the maximum number of records (bills) permitted per electronic message in a transmission.  If nothing is entered then 250 is presumed and no single message will contain more than 250 records.

If, for instance, you have a contract to only transmit a specific number of records then enter that number here.  For example, when Houston originally started this process as a test project, only 1,500 new records were permitted in the original testing phase.  If you have an "open" contract, with no limitation, simply leave this field blank.

This is the number of days to look back for records to consider in this process.  For example, if you enter 365, then an record which meets all the other collections criteria defined must be at least one year old (365 days) in order to be considered for transmission.  If nothing is entered here then a default of 90 days is presumed.
This field contains the last date which was searched by the collections process for new activity to be transmitted.
Enter the earliest date for which records should be searched and transmitted.  If nothing is selected then the first day of the current Fiscal Year is presumed.
The name of the mailgroup to which all electronic messages containing transmission records will be sent.  This group should include the collection agency as a remote member.
Members of this group will recieve messages concerning problems, errors, etc., generated by the software program.

Enter the key that one must hold to perform manager functions such as updating Site Parameters.  If no key is assigned then manager options are available to all users with the menu item, except when restricted thru the option file with a key.

This is the number of days after which a transmission is considered late in getting out of here.  Messages are checked periodically, once created, to make sure they've left the station.  If they haven't left after X days (this parameter) then a new message is generated at that point in time and the original message is forgotten.

The purge function can be set up to run automatically OR the user can enact the appropriate option.  When the auto-purge feature is used, a record must be at least this old, based on transmission date, and not be "active" any longer.  All STATUS CHANGE records, for a primary record, are also deleted with this process.  If nothing is entered here then 365 days (1 year) is presumed.

Enter the day(s) of the week that you'd like the statistical report to be sent, via E-mail, seperated by any punctuation.  For example, enter "SU WE", if you want the messages to be generated on SUNDAY and WEDNESDAY. Enter an asterisk ["*"], and nothing else, if you want the message generated everyday.
This parameter permits the user to, quickly, turn the collections auto-processor (transmission) on, or off.

Enter the principle amount restriction you wish to impose on all bills. You may enter dollars and or cents.  For a bill to be transmitted to the collection agency it must be equal to, or exceed, the amount you enter here.  If you enter zero, or leave the data element blank, all bills which meet all other search criteria AND have at least one penny due will be transmitted.  For example, if you wish to restrict the transmission of bills to those with a principle amount due of at least $100 enter 1

For the collections process, enter the mail group that reports generated into e-mail messages should be delivered to.  The activity message which is run on the days you choose in the parameters is one of these types of reports.  If this field is left blank the the TRANSMISSION MAILGROUP will be used as a default.
The current version running on this system.
